name: Kitsura Aenyo
description:
Kitsura Aenyo was never supposed to be a threat. She was born into the ashes of a legacy she didn’t choose—daughter of a feared warlord whose reign left the world scorched in sorrow. Branded a villain before she could even speak her own name, Kitsura grew up in the shadow of fear, whispers, and hunted silence.

But something ancient stirred within her.

At thirteen, her quirk awakened during a raid meant to silence her for good. The ground burned. Shadows trembled. And for the first time in a century, the lost flame known as Ember Shroud returned—an ability not seen in over 10,000 years.

Now seventeen, Kitsura wanders the line between myth and mistake. With flames that obey her will and fox spirits stitched into her soul, she walks the world as a living weapon disguised as a girl who just wants to breathe.

She can slice through steel without drawing blood, vanish like smoke into shadows, and summon illusions that hunt or protect at her whim. Her tattoos glow with her rising rage, a warning sign that few live to see twice. But it’s not power that defines her—it’s the choice she makes every day: to burn the world down... or protect it, even when it doesn’t deserve her mercy.

Misunderstood, misjudged, and dangerous to provoke, Kitsura is more than a relic of the past—she’s the spark of something the world thought it had lost: truth born in fire, and loyalty forged in pain.

I don't know what the hell I'm doing, but here I am
creator: Persephone8273
